channel.title: Ghost Detail Autos Blog — Car Detailing Watford
channel.description: Expert car detailing tips, ceramic coating guides, and paint correction advice from Ghost Detail Autos, Sandown Road, Watford WD18.

item.title: Ceramic Coating vs Wax: Why Wax is a Waste of Money in 2026
item.description: Professional ceramic coating has replaced wax for serious car owners. Here's why.

item.title: What Is Paint Correction? A Plain-English Guide
item.description: Paint correction explained simply — what it is, what causes paint damage, and whether you need it.

item.title: PPF vs Ceramic Coating: Which Does Your Car Need?
item.description: PPF and ceramic coating do completely different jobs. Here's which one you need.

item.title: Car Detailing in Watford: What to Look For
item.description: A guide to car detailing in Watford — what separates professional from valet.
